underlying_signals.label: Element structure drift
underlying_signals.reason: The first differing byte is a coordinate or viewport attribute, but the rendered element counts already diverge, so the true root cause is earlier than post-Graphviz coordinate extraction.

fix_suggestions.label: Element structure drift
fix_suggestions.reason: Rendered element counts already diverge, so compare earlier render structure or shared text assembly before post-dot coordinate extraction.

code_anchors.label: Graphviz/Svek core
code_anchors.reason: Graphviz-backed diagrams usually diverge in SvekResult bounds, LimitFinder participation, or final SVG coordinate normalization.

code_anchors.label: Element structure drift
